---
title: "Have I grooved to this before? Discriminating practised and observed actions in a novel context"
authors: "Sumanapala, D., Fish, L., Jones, A. L., & Cross, E."
year: 2017
date: 2017-01-01
pub-journal: "Acta Psychologica"
volume: "175"
pages: "42–49"
doi: "10.1016/j.actpsy.2017.02.008"
pdf: "assets/papers/2017/sumanapala_etal_2017.pdf"
categories: [other]
---
